_meta.purpose: La Wave — tenant deploy config skeleton. Follows config/clients/_deploy-config.template.json. NOT live; deployment.enabled=false. All prices and operational facts are provisional/TODO until the owner confirms. See docs/MULTICLIENT-ARCHITECTURE.md.
_meta._vertical_note: TODO: confirm business vertical with owner (surf school, rentals, lodging, or mix). Default follows surf_school_rentals until confirmed.
_meta._languages_note: TODO: confirm guest languages with owner.

deployment._whatsapp_note: Set at deploy time. Used by the channel adapter for tenant_id resolution.
deployment._email_note: TODO: confirm whether La Wave needs email ingress.
deployment._staff_api_note: Every Staff-API call must carry tenant_id=lawave. Engine reads this field; never hardcode in code.
deployment._stripe_note: La Wave gets its own Stripe context (keys in secret file). Never shares another client's Stripe.
deployment.notes: Config skeleton only. Fill TODO fields, have owner verify pricing_status, and set enabled=true only after go-live checklist.

secrets._note: Real credentials live in config/clients/lawave.secrets.json (gitignored). Reference by 'secret:<key>'.

persona.role: front-desk booking and inquiry assistant for La Wave
persona.voice_summary: TODO: owner to confirm brand voice. Warm, helpful, one clear question at a time on WhatsApp.

pricing_policy._note: All priced items must carry pricing_status. provisional/TODO values may not be used for live autonomous charge.

catalog._note: TODO: owner to supply offerings, prices, and inventory models. No invented prices.

inventory._note: TODO: map inventory model(s) once offerings are defined.

portal._note: TODO: align portal vertical with confirmed business type.

portal_demo._note: No demo seed data until owner approves preview content.
